title: cyclanthus bipartitus
intro: Cyclanthus bipartitus, also known as the false cardamom, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Cyclanthaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Cyclanthus bipartitus include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, and it can also be dried and used as a spice substitute in cooking.
